name: systematic-debugging
summary: Enforces root-cause investigation before any fix attempt. The iron law: no fixes without completed Phase 1 investigation.

name: no-fluff
summary: Ultra-compressed communication mode reducing token usage by ~75% while preserving all technical accuracy.

name: writing-plans
summary: Turns a spec into a detailed, executable multi-step implementation plan with exact file paths, actual code, and no placeholders.

name: ai-slop-cleaner
summary: Reduces AI-generated code bloat through regression-tests-first, smell-by-smell cleanup that preserves behavior.

name: requesting-code-review
summary: Dispatches a focused code-reviewer subagent with precise context to catch issues before merging.

name: receiving-code-review
summary: Evaluates code review feedback with technical rigor — verify before implementing, push back when wrong.

name: pr-triage
summary: Identifies the pull requests that most deserve attention by urgency, business impact, and merge risk.

name: repo-map
summary: Produces a structured architecture overview of an unfamiliar codebase before making any changes.

name: bug-hunt
summary: Reproduces, isolates, and fixes a bug with the smallest safe change — root cause first, symptom never.

name: safe-refactor
summary: Restructures code in small, safe, independently reversible steps without changing observable behavior.

name: defuddle
summary: Extracts clean markdown from web pages using Defuddle CLI, removing navigation and clutter to save tokens.

name: markitdown-file-intake
summary: Converts PDF, Office docs, images, audio, and other formats to Markdown before inspection.
